scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev .wrangler/dist/public --binding RUNTIME_SCHEMA_INIT=true --binding ADMIN_TOKEN=dev-admin-token --compatibility-date=2026-06-28 --persist-to=.wrangler/state
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy .wrangler/dist/public --project-name=furniture-platform-v2
scripts.smoke:all: npm run smoke:packages && npm run smoke:suppliers && npm run smoke:advisor
